title: V. Anantha Nageswaran: Do humans know when to stop? The AI race forces us to confront this question
description: It is easy to embrace restraint when it is rewarding. But when it comes to risky innovation like AI or gain-of-function research, the incentive structure is loaded against wilful restraint. That's also why reckless risk-taking often spells disaster.
